description_long: This is a classic compact car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a pale blue-gray color. The vehicle features two doors on each side, rounded fenders, and a sloping rear with small, circular taillights. The front end is characterized by a pair of round headlights, a simple chrome bumper, and a license plate reading 'RMKL577M'. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels have whitewall tires with chrome hubcaps. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century European cars, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on smooth, curved surfaces.
description: A pale blue-gray classic compact car with rounded body, chrome accents, and whitewall tires. Features two doors per side, round headlights, and a sloping rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing round headlights, chrome bumper, and license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting two doors, rounded fenders, and whitewall tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying circular taillights, sloping trunk, and rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to left, showing doors, fenders, and wheels.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round headlights, single unit per side, classic chrome bezel
